{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Bladden's Statue
|class_id=20299
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=Upon learning of Bladden's demise, Earth's Will had statues crafted in the likeness of his head. These were made to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe and to be bestowed upon distinguished Travelers, allowing them to share in the joy of victory!
|fame=16
|art=13
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +50<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +100<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
}}

[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Demon God Boost]]
[[Category:Leadership Boost]]
